prompt: Create an application called EcoTrack that focuses on promoting sustainable practices and tracking pollution levels. The app should feature a carbon footprint calculator that helps users understand their impact on the environment. Include a pollution monitoring dashboard that provides real-time data on local pollution levels. Create a resource hub containing information on sustainable living practices. Allow users to participate in community challenges aimed at reducing environmental impact, incorporating gamification elements to encourage eco-friendly actions. The UI should be engaging and informative, with clear visualizations of data.

build_spec.tech_stack: Django backend, Vue.js frontend, SQLite database, REST API

_agent5.problem: Climate change and ocean pollution continue to escalate, demanding immediate action for sustainable practices and pollution reduction.
_agent5.description: EcoTrack is a comprehensive platform designed to promote sustainable practices and track pollution levels in real-time. It allows users to monitor their carbon footprint, access resources for sustainable living, and participate in community initiatives focused on reducing environmental impact.
